description: Cert-agnostic catalog of question validation rules. Versioned: changing a rule is a contract change.

rules.name: Well-formed
rules.check: Has a non-empty stem, >=3 options, exactly one option marked correct, and a non-empty rationale.

rules.name: Single defensible answer
rules.check: Only one option is defensibly correct; the others are unambiguously incorrect given the objective.

rules.name: Anchored to objective
rules.check: The question evaluates the declared objective_id (using objective_text), not another topic.

rules.name: No leakage / protected material
rules.check: Does not reproduce real exam questions or protected vendor text. Original material.

rules.name: Plausible distractors
rules.check: Distractors are believable to someone who has not mastered the topic; they are not absurd or filler.

rules.name: Wording quality
rules.check: No confusing negations, no 'all/none of the above' as a crutch, no grammatical tells that give away the answer, no ambiguity.

overall_logic: FAIL if any critical rule fails. REVIEW if all critical rules pass but any quality rule fails. PASS if all pass.
